items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Lightning Staff
items.description: Cast orbs that shoot lightning at your enemies when they get too close! Enemies hit are dealt 20 damage each.

items.name: Zombification Injection
items.description: Steal other people's life force to transform yourself into a powerful and angry zombie.  As a zombie, use your powerful hammer to do 40 damage per hit to other players.

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Staff
items.description: Use the magical power of Emeralds to immobilize and shock your target!

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Sword
items.description: Strike at your foes and in addition to doing damage you will push them to the ground.

items.name: Sharp Looking Hat - the Gear
items.description: It's not just sharp looking. It's actually sharp! Throw this hat at opponents to do damage with its razor sharp edges.  Don't worry about getting it back - it magically appears back on your head after it hits something.

items.name: Holiday Ornament Staff
items.description: Send a giant holiday ornament hurling at your enemies to squish them.

items.name: The Pharaoh Guard's Sword
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 14 to 17 damage. With each slash you'll unlock the ancient power of the Pharaoh's Guard and have a chance at preforming a secret attack or enjoying a hidden power up!

items.name: Dynamically Lit Sword
items.description: Darkness strikes in the light!  Swing your glowing sword at your foes to do 25 damage per hit.

items.name: Bejeweled Sword of Great Fury
items.description: Do you see red or blue?  This fierce sword lets you switch between Ruby and Sapphire attacks.  In Ruby mode you deal 40 damage per hit, but take 15 damage yourself. In Sapphire mode you do 15 damage per hit, but can strike at a great speed, and heal yourself with each hit you land.

items.name: Winterfang: The Fateful
items.description: Across the frozen tundra Winterfang ran, tracking his master's scent over a hundred miles. He would never abandon a friend in their time of need. Simply equip this item and he will spawn in front of you- ready to ride.

items.name: Quick Potion
items.description: Zoom zoom!!!

items.name: Wraith's Screech Potion
items.description: His scream pierces all that come near him.

items.name: Dragon's Breath Potion
items.description: Yeah this does exactly what you think it does. Drink it and you can shoot flames at anything and everything!

items.name: RobloTim's RobloHunk Potion
items.description: Want to be the next superstar in town? Then this potion is for you! Brewed by our very own RobloTim, this potion make you into a solid weight lifting champion. Huge muscles, strong arms and giving + 100% health and movement speed! Once transformed you can use other gear to fight or show off!

items.name: The Necrosapien Staff
items.description: It's Latin. Look it up. Necromancers are supposed to like Latin.

items.name: Festive Dual Plungers
items.description: Rapidly fire your very own holiday decorated dual plungers!  Each plunger does 14 damage!

items.name: Sword of the Autumnal Winds
items.description: Leafing your enemies in your dust....

items.name: Keytar Sword
items.description: This electro-axe is a sword!

items.name: Staff of the Raging Storm
items.description: The storm that rages within is now external.

items.name: Wooden Dreidel
items.description:
I have a little dreidel /
I made it out of clay /
And when it's dry and ready /
Then dreidel I shall play! /
PS - This dreidel is actually made out of wood, but the dreidel song was obligatory - Spin the dreidel and see how many chocolate coins you win!

items.name: Annoying Elf: Keith
items.description: These elves have a mind of their own!  Keith is no exception.  And he's got matches - I smell trouble...and hot dogs?

items.name: Superhero Potion
items.description: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a flying Robloxian shooting fireballs?

items.name: Kittypult
items.description: Fire fierce, angry, scratching cats at other players.  Warning - do not try this in real life.

items.name: Inflatable Sword
items.description: A classic April Fool's prank from medieval times was to swap a friend’s sword for an inflatable one. They rarely got the point, though.

items.name: Frost Potion
items.description: Brr..... it's cold in here.  There must be some frost potion in the atmosphere!

items.name: DarkAge Bo Staff
items.description: Slash at your foes with a bo staff to do 15 damage.  Show off your extreme prowess by hitting the 'Q' key to activate the special attack - summon a line of deadly purple flames that will flow in any direction you face.

items.name: Deadly Thorn Potion
items.description: Use the potion to grow powerful thorns all over your body.  Your enemies don't stand a chance!

items.name: Sword of Unvanquished Snakes
items.description: It's said that Saint Patrick rid Ireland of snakes.  What do you think he did with them?  Put them in the sword of course!  Now you can use this sword's special attack to send 15 snakes slithering dangerously towards your foes.  Also functions as a regular sword and does 10 damage per hit.

items.name: The Merry Avenger
items.description: His vengeance is swift and just..... and merry!

items.name: Tiger's Wrath Sword
items.description: ROAR!  Attack your foes with the speed of a tiger. If you are able to slay 5 foes with this mighty sword, you will be able to use its special Tiger Raig attack- which lets you slash over and over again and creates a red danger circle that will do damage to anyone within it.
